name: skill-optimizer
description: Measure and improve how well a plugin's skills help agents solve real tasks. Runs activation evals (does the skill self-activate?) and content evals (does it help solve the task?), diagnoses gaps, fixes instructions, and re-runs until scores improve.

interface.shortDescription: Measure and improve how well a plugin's skills help agents solve real tasks
interface.longDescription: Measure and improve how well a plugin's skills help agents solve real tasks. Runs activation evals (does the skill self-activate?) and content evals (does it help solve the task?), diagnoses gaps, fixes instructions, and re-runs until scores improve.
defaultPrompt: Help me use Skill Optimizer for my current task.
